title: LONDON MOTH KILLER 10 (TEN) Premium Sticky Pheromone Moth Traps for the Common Clothes Moth and Similar Variants, for Wardrobes, Clothes and Carpets. inc. eBook (London Moth)
bullet_points: ✅LONDON MOTH Sticky carpet and clothes Pheromone moth traps help to protect your wardrobe and other precious fabrics from existing and future generations of moth larvae. Crucially less noxious than moth repellent spray and transfluthrin sachets for clothes storage. Each sticky Pheromone moth trap lasts for 4 months once opened and are non-toxic, odourless, and totally safe around inquisitive pets and children.

✅ Professional Moth Prevention for your home and business from the people who know moths. The powerful pheromone laden glue in our moth traps are designed to monitor, attract and restrain the most destructive house moths in the UK.

✅Targets the Common Clothes Moth and can also be effective for the Case Making and Pale Backed Moth. NOT SUITABLE for The Brown House Moth, White Shouldered Moth, Indian Meal Moth and other harmless Lepidoptera such as the Bumble Bee Wax Moth. If in doubt, please get in touch prior to purchase. We are ALWAYS happy to help and offer advice.
